text.title: Strategy Methods Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: frame-context
step.action: Tag context by market maturity, data availability, team skill.

step.name: score-candidates
step.action: Score each candidate method on fit axes.

step.name: pick-and-justify
step.action: Pick top method; capture limitations + decided_by.
